summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ChatEmbed AI new features: Dashboard email verification banner, Widget customization, Billing management, and AI Engine settings. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/ai/config - returns current AI engine configuration (claude/ollama)
GET /api/ai/config - returns 401 for unauthenticated requests
PUT /api/ai/config - updates engine to claude
PUT /api/ai/config - updates engine to ollama with settings (url, model)
PUT /api/ai/config - rejects invalid engine with 400
GET /api/billing/plans - returns 4 plans (free, starter, pro, agency) with correct structure
GET /api/billing/plans - pricing is correct (€0, €29, €79, €199)
POST /api/billing/change-plan - downgrades to free plan
POST /api/billing/change-plan - returns Stripe checkout URL for paid plans
POST /api/billing/change-plan - rejects invalid plan with 400
POST /api/billing/change-plan - returns 401 for unauthenticated requests
POST /api/auth/resend-verification - works for existing user
POST /api/auth/verify-email - rejects invalid token with 400
GET /api/auth/me - returns email_verified field
PUT /api/chatbots/{id} - updates and persists widget customization fields
GET /api/chatbot-public/{id} - returns owner_plan and can_hide_branding
GET /api/billing - returns subscription and transactions
Dashboard shows email verification banner for unverified users
Dashboard hides verification banner for verified users
Verification banner 'Resend' button calls /api/auth/resend-verification and gets mock_token
Verification banner 'Verify' button calls /api/auth/verify-email with token
Verification success banner appears after verification
AI Settings page (/dashboard/ai-settings) loads correctly
AI Settings page shows Claude and Ollama engine cards
AI Settings page Ollama config section appears when Ollama is selected
AI Settings page has Ollama URL input and model select
AI Settings page has Save AI Settings button
Billing page (/dashboard/billing) loads correctly
Billing page shows current plan card with FREE badge
Billing page shows plan comparison grid with 4 plans
Billing page shows upgrade buttons for paid plans
Billing page shows payment history (Rechnungen)
ChatbotEdit page has 4 tabs: Edit, Widget Design, Embed Code, Preview
Widget Design tab has color picker and hex input
Widget Design tab has 7 quick color buttons
Widget Design tab has corner style dropdown
Widget Design tab has position dropdown
Widget Design tab has greeting input
Widget Design tab has logo URL input
Widget Design tab has branding removal section (locked for free plan)
Widget Design tab has Save Widget Settings button
Sidebar has AI Engine link
seed_data_creation: Temporarily set email_verified=False for test user to test verification banner, then verified via UI flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (dashboard verification banner, widget customization, billing management, AI settings) are working correctly. Email sending is MOCKED - tokens are returned in API responses for demo mode. Test user is on free plan. Branding removal is correctly locked for free plan users. Stripe checkout creates real sessions but with test keys.

mocked_apis.email_delivery: Email sending is mocked - verification tokens are returned directly in API responses (mock_token) for demo/testing purposes
mocked_apis.stripe_checkout: Stripe checkout creates real sessions but with test keys (sk_test_emergent)

dashboard_verification_banner.description: Shows banner for unverified users, hides for verified users, resend button gets mock_token, verify button verifies email

sidebar_ai_engine_link.description: AI Engine link present in sidebar navigation
